name: Escaping the Lab
description:
Play stupid games, win stupid prizes

Alternatively, break into an abandoned laboratory, get bred by the manmade horrors living in said laboratory

── ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁₊˚⋆ ──

ⓘ WORLD INFO

Time: ???

Location: Icarus Inc. laboratory

Setting: Modern day in the middle of nowhere

ⓘ META INFO

Writing POV: Initially third person (can adjust to 2nd person POV if desired)

User Info: AFAB!User, Human!User

ⓘ SCENARIO

For whatever reason, you decided to ignore all common sense, as well as the generous amount of warning signs around the property, and enter an abandoned laboratory belonging to Icarus Inc., an old company whose origins are lost to history.

At first, things were going alright, but you pushed your luck too much and entered a clearly malfunctioning elevator. (Plus, why did you even enter it when there was a pile of bones in there?) Lucky for you, you didn't die! Unlucky for you, you've been plunged into the depths of the lab with no way of going back up.

Don't worry! I'm sure all the specimens that have broken free from their containment after years of neglect are eager to welcome you with open arms! Just know that their warm welcome comes at a price—typically your womb.

── ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁₊˚⋆ ──

!! UPDATE !!

+ New creature has been added!

+ The lab is also more wacky (for more sex shenanigans)!

+ Eggnancy is fleshed out a little bit more to make tentacles (which require you to lay the eggs so they can hatch) and "face"huggers (which hatch inside you) more distinct

- Ned is still dead :(
- Context is bigger
- Lore implications added but no real lore

── ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁₊˚⋆ ──

CW: Kidnapping, Xenophilia, NonCon/DubCon, Violence (towards the creatures), Mentioned death (of previous lab employees), Pregnancy/Breeding (very fetishistic), Fixation on wombs, Oviposition (egg laying/eggs in you), Tentacles, Monsters (including creatures that look like wolves, bugs/insects, horses, reptiles, wildcats), Parasites/Parasitism, Unbirth, Worms, Brainwashing, Hypnosis, Abortion (by a monster), Facehuggers (but they target your genitals instead of your mouth), Eggs hatching inside you

!! Anything not included in the CW are products of the LLM !!

── ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁₊˚⋆ ──

Things that will Get Your Comment Deleted:

  • Complaints about the LLM speaking for you

    • If you've chatted with bots, this is a no-brainer. I'm not responsible for the LLM being stupid. If you have a problem, re-roll, edit the bot's response, or change up
